transcript.text:
(Reason why they're so busy...)
(Tzuyang is here!) I should try all three, right?
(Even the name is delicious...)
("Tteokcham" Where they make great tteokbokki)
It's amazing... You'll come back for more
(3 kinds of Tteokcham tteokbokki!!)
(Let's verify the amazing taste)
(What is the evaluation result...?!)
(Amazing)
(It amazes us as well...) How does she eat like that?
(But what is this cutie...?)
(Tteokcham + Minions combo!!) What?
(Minions that really tug at your heartstrings)
(and the happy 27-year-old Tzuyang)
(Let's begin their laughter-filled happy Tteokcham mukbang right now!)
Hello, everyone

I am here to eat tteokbokki today
It's called "Tteokcham" which means they make the greatest tteokbokki
And I heard they also collaborated with Minions
along with releasing new dishes, so here I am
(So cute)
(You can only see us in Tteokcham)
("Tteokcham" where they make great tteokbokki)
(Anseong branch in Gyeonggi-do)
(Enters the store) Hello
Why aren't you greeting back LOL!
(They look very nervous LOL)
- Hello! - Hello
Minions!!
(Super cute Minions with cute packaging as well)
Kids will really like these
(So-called sporks) sporks

What do I have to order to get that?
If you buy the combo menu, we give you this for free
(Gotta get it when it's available) I heard this was going out of stock
(Opening the spork!)
Cute!
(It's so adorable...)
I will eat with this today
(Scanning the menu) There are a lot of dishes
The basic tteokbokki
is sold most often
(280mm fried calamari called "Gigantic Squid") There's something called "Gigantic Squid"
And our signature boneless fried chicken!
We also have boneless seasoned chicken as well
The boneless chicken isn't too much
so if you order shrimp crackers as sides
and dip it in the tteokbokki sauce, it's very good

(Should we start ordering then...?) I should try all three tteokbokkis, right?
(Emergency)
(Tteokcham tteokbokki, rosé tteokbokki, truffle cream tteokbokki) I'd like all three kinds of tteokbokki
And boneless fried chicken,
mini ham and mayo gimbap, mini tuna mayo gimbap,
butter cream fries,
one seaweed roll, one fried fish cake
(Nervous eyes)
Two Gigantic Squid
(She takes out writing utensils LOL) And...
Two cheese sticks
And one fish cake soup
Oh... okay....
There's glass noodles in the Tteokcham tteokbokki
And if you add cocktail sausages in the rosé tteokbokki,
it'll be much more delicious

(Done ordering with the recommended combo!) Then please make it like that
(The kitchen becomes busy with the 1-person(?) order)
(Let's fall into)
(the charms of Tteokcham)
(A perfect combo of rice cakes, fish cakes, and green onions)
(Tteokcham tteokbokki)
(The trendiest tteokbokki)
(Rosé tteokbokki)
(The strong taste of truffles swirling around in your mouth)
(Truffle cream tteokbokki)
(2 kinds of mini ham mayo & tuna mayo gimbap)
(A combination you can enjoy that is cost-effective)
(Boneless fried chicken & shrimp crackers)
(Topped with a load of butter cream)
(Butter cream fries)
(Tteokcham approaches Tzuyang!)

(We are on standby...)
(The dishes keep on coming...)
(They're all here)
First off, I don't think I used
(Reunited after about 20 years) a spork after once in kindergarten...
Bon appetit!
What should I eat first? I'll try the basic tteokbokki first
Oh, for the variety of rice cakes,
(Variety of rice cakes: Made with flour, noodle-shaped, made with rice!) there's ones made with rice and ones with flour, and more
But I ordered everything made with flour
This spork works really well!
Oh, the good thing about a spork
is that you can pick up the rice cake and have soup at the same time
No matter what gender or age,
you will love this tteokbokki!
(The spork can even pick up glass noodles) This spork is useful

(Glass noodles + rice cake) I'll pick up one rice cake here...
But this time,
(All of the dishes have a 1-serving option!) they released a 1-serving dish, where you can enjoy alone
(How lovely... 1-serving menu...!) I think it is the right amount of portions
I've only ordered these individually
but there are a lot of combo menus here
I guess the combos are really popular
These Minions as well
If you order a certain combo, you can get this spork
(There's a variety of Minions combos as well) There's a Minions combo where you can have chicken and rice
I need to eat the gimbap!!
I think it'll go very well with the tteokbokki sauce
(Dip it in the Tteokcham tteokbokki sauce!)
It's good
I love the mini gimbap but more importantly,
it's very plump even if it's mini

It's like 1.5 times plumper than a regular mini gimbap
(Dipping the fried fish cake in the sauce as well!)
The fried fish cake is good!
(The crunchy seaweed roll too!)
(Press)
(Multi-purpose spork) This spork works for everything
(You can spoon up the fish cake soup with the spork too!)
The fish cake soup is good
(Next is the boneless fried chicken) I heard their chicken is really good
(The crispiness can be felt beyond the screen) I'll try the chicken
(Dip it in the sauce) I'll dip it in the tteokbokki sauce
(The owner said to dip the shrimp cracker in the sauce too...)
(As expected) It goes well with it
This is chicken for 1 person
so that's the amount that they give you
But it's quite a lot for one person

Let's try a different tteokbokki! Rosé tteokbokki!
(The combination of spicy and creamy, the trendiest one these days) Wow, it looks good
(The furrows of truth) It's good
There's that signature flavor
and I love that...
Should I eat it with the Gigantic Squid?
(The Gigantic Squid is beautifully big...) It's really gigantic! It's so big!
(Dip it in the rosé tteokbokki!)
(Once in the Tteokcham tteokbokki as well!)
It's full of squid inside!
(Filled)
(I'll show you it with a new one!) It's really long, look how it sticks out
(Amazing length of 280mm!)
It's really long, right?
(The PR ambassador for the Gigantic Squid) I really wanted to show you it
Next is truffle cream tteokbokki!

Oh, it looks good
(The color is on point!!) I love the color
There's a subtle truffle scent
(Suddenly onions...??) and a bit of onion...?
It's my first time eating this and it's good
It's a new kind of cream tteokbokki
I love how the soup is warm
I haven't tried the cheese stick and the mini tuna mayo gimbap
(Mini version of tuna mayo gimbap!) There's perilla leaves and a lot of tuna inside
(Dipping it in the rosé tteokbokki!)
It's really good
It said five rolls of mini gimbap
so I thought they were going to be really tiny
But how can mini gimbap be this big?!
(It's actually a plus...)
It's so good

(Next is the butter cream fries!)
Wow, these days,
butter cream fries are popular, you know?
It's good
I'll try dipping the chicken in the cream sauce too
(I found it... The best combination...) It goes really well with it! I think this is the best combo
I've eaten all of it except for the cheese stick
I'll try the cheese stick now
(It's really hot LOLOL)
It's a load of cheese!
It's very salty,
it's very savory, and the cheese stick is really delicious
And I love that it's long
(The cheese stretches endlessly!)
(And it's as hot as well LOL!) Oh, it's hot
(She picked up the spork LOL) There's a lot of cheese inside

(It's really good)
This makes you feel really full
(Sneak)
The gimbap is cost-effective!
3,500 won for 5 rolls of mini ham mayo gimbap
(Goodbye, white T-shirt again...) No
I can't resist fish cakes when I have tteokbokki
Oh, but
this really makes me want to have it because
(Everything has the cute Minions!!) the chicken box and the paper bag for the fries
look really pretty
I think it's good for a collection as well
(Are you talking about me?) Are you selling this toy too?
Oh, this isn't part of the set?
(Nope)
Oh, it can be a gift specially for you today, Tzuyang...

(Happy)
(At an age to love toys) It's so cute, wow, it moves?
(Hi Tzuyang)
(She looks genuinely excited)
(It's so cute, isn't it...?) Can I really keep it?
(Pat pat)
(I like pets!!) So cute
(LOL Happy enough to fall over? LOL)
(Calm down, Minion!!) Okay, okay, stay still!
(No)
(Turns off the Minion)
This is a delicious sausage!
How does she eat it all?!??
(The biggest mystery of all...)
I had a feeling you like rice cake bar tteokbokki
(Tteokbokki prepared by Tteokcham...?) So we have one that we made with rice cake bars

Would you like to eat it?
Rice cake bar tteokbokki...
That's not originally on the menu, right?
(Correct) No, it is not
(Rice cake bar tteokbokki specially made for her) We made it, so please try it and tell us how it is
(Will they be able to release this rice cake bar tteokbokki?) Really? I'd love that
(I'm curious about you, rice cake bar tteokbokki...) Please wait a moment
(They make the tteokbokki with the whole rice cake bar)
(A dish that will captivate Tzuyang's tastebuds)
(Will it be a new dish? This new secret weapon!)
(Adding a bunch of spiciness as well!)
Thank you
This is the truffle mayonnaise sauce
Truffle mayonnaise?
(Dipping the spicy rice cake bar tteokbokki into the truffle mayo sauce) You dip the tteokbokki in this? That's cool
(There's more...?) And this goes with the Minions

We've prepared mini sweet potato churros
Thank you!
(Trying the rice cake bar tteokbokki first!) There's a bunch of chili peppers on top
It's a rice cake bar, and it's really plump!
It's my first time dipping tteokbokki into mayonnaise...
(Having doubts) Really?
(Putting worries aside, she takes a huge bite...!)
(Does it suit her taste..??)
(She absolutely loves it) It's perfectly tasty
Since I dipped it in the truffle mayo,
it's less spicy
- (Is it good...?) - (I think she likes it!)
Mmm! It goes so well together!
It's good
(Let's try the mini sweet potato churros as well!)
(There's sweet potato mousse inside...!)

(We're watching you)
(Best combination of spicy and sweet!) It's spicy and salty, and this is sweet, so it goes well together
(Very delicious!) It's good, I can smell the chili peppers as well
It's really good
I don't know if they'll release this dish
(Standby mode) but I'll keep my hopes up
I'll order it if they do!
I love rice cake bars
It's the best
After eating rice cake bar tteokbokki,
if you eat this mini sweet potato churro,
the spiciness calms down!
Personally,
I like the rosé fried chicken
(Truffle cream sauce wins 1st place!) But this cream chicken is the best!
(Truffle cream chicken...Jot it down...) It goes so well together

(Oh, right...!!) I forgot I had this thing
(280mm Gigantic Squid stick!) I had this!
(Once again, we are back with the inhaling show...)
The last fried fish cake!
(Rosé is amazing...) Anything dipped in rosé sauce is good
(Last piece of boneless fried chicken!)
(With the truffle cream sauce till the end)
(You still have me) Cleared
The amount of tteokbokki
is quite a lot and she eats so well...
(0 challenges, 1 loss) I thought I would eat better but I think I'm wrong
(Targeting the shrimp crackers...)
I ate all the rice cakes!
(You still have me...) I can see it from here
Where is it?
(Right here) Did I not finish all the rice cakes?

There's some here!
(Only nice people can see the rice cakes) There's some here too?
(Bad person) I really didn't know
How could I have only one remaining in each?
(She is sure the queen of balance)
(She's electrified with deliciousness)
(Spice wimp mode turns on)
Wow, this is really spicy....
(A clean kind of spiciness of the chili peppers) It's not the normal kind of spicy, it's spiciness of the chili peppers
If you like spicy food and you like rice cake bars, you would love this
(Rice cake bar tteokbokki... Please release it soon...)
Oh right, it wasn't spicy before because!!
(For the spice wimps out there) Even those who can't eat spicy stuff can eat this
(Truffle mayo is waiting for you!) There's mayo! If you dip it in here, it's not spicy
It's really good to dip tteokbokki in mayo!
It's a new kind of taste for me!!

The chicken as well as the tteokbokki is a lot for 1 serving
(Cleared the fish cake soup!)
(The food as been slayed...)
("Tteokcham" All Clear!)
The end
Wow, amazing...
Ohhh!
(Thumbs up for me too)
I really enjoyed the meal!
(Come out to the world, rice cake bar tteokbokki!) I really think they can release the rice cake bar tteokbokki
(Tzuyang's fave rice cake bar tteokbokki coming soon!)
Today, I had delicious tteokbokki and sides in "Tteokcham"
You know, this spork
I heard this is really popular these days
I heard that they will release a lot more merch after the spork too
Plus, if you eat this Minions combo meal

and write a review on your social media,
they will do a random draw
and give you a limited-time Minions ready bag
So I think it'll be really good to try this Minions combo
set where they give you this cute spork too
(I'm cute so take me)
(Cuteness that makes you order right away)
I had
another great meal!
Tteokcham will use high-quality ingredients
cleanly and with our best efforts
to show you the best kind of taste
Please visit us a lot
Tteokcham, you can do it!!
(Minions will cheer for you too, Tteokcham!)
